text_block_list.text:
One day, a letter from a fan arrives for Meisho
Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A f-fan letter? It... can't be for me, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they got the names mixed up? I mean,
there isn't one good thing about me...
choice_data_list: Why don't you try reading it first?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I should, shouldn't I? Okay, here goes! Um...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
"I love how hardworking you are. I'm clumsy too,
so you give me courage."

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy... This is just like how I was in the
past.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I remember listening to a post-race interview and
hearing the winner say, "I was able to overcome
my flaws."

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It gave me courage, enough courage to come to
this academy... And now, now I'm the one who's...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Trainer, I promise to work even harder.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Because... despite my many flaws, I was able to
encourage someone!

From this day on, Meisho Doto puts in far more
effort during our training sessions.
